mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_BASIC ( LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USER_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{email}, #{phoneNo}, #{password}, #{name}, #{genderCode}, #{birthDate}, #{userStatus}, #{insertUserId} )

INSERT INTO USER_DETAIL ( USER_ID, FRIEND_MESSAGE_AVAIL_YN, CONFIRM_YN_1, CONFIRM_YN_2, CONFIRM_YN_3, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendMessageAvailYN}, #{confirmYN1}, #{confirmYN2}, #{confirmYN3}, #{insertUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT LONGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USE_sTATUS FROM USER_BASIC WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
